gates.name: JSON-safe event serialization
gates.evidence: CognitiveEvent.to_dict/from_dict round trip is covered by tests/test_m61_cognitive_events.py.

gates.name: Required event metadata
gates.evidence: Events include turn_id, cycle, session_id, persona_id, source, salience, priority, ttl, timestamp, and payload.

gates.name: Deterministic identity and ordering
gates.evidence: make_cognitive_event_id uses session_id, persona_id, turn_id, cycle, event_type, source, and sequence_index without wall-clock input.

gates.name: Filtering and persona partitioning
gates.evidence: CognitiveEventBus.filter supports event_type, source, min_salience, and persona_id.

gates.name: No behavior side effects
gates.evidence: Scripted dialogue actions and generated text match with and without CognitiveEventBus under RuleBasedGenerator.

gates.name: No raw prompt or full history leakage
gates.evidence: PromptAssemblyEvent stores bounded capsule metadata only; GenerationEvent stores bounded diagnostics keys and reply length, not raw prompt text or full conversation history.

gates.name: Every MVP event type has a consumer surface
gates.evidence: COGNITIVE_EVENT_CONSUMERS maps all MVP event types to trace, state_update, prompt_assembly_audit, or evaluation.

test_evidence.command: python -m pytest tests/test_m50_chat_pipeline.py tests/test_m51_dialogue_channels.py tests/test_m53_dialogue_action.py tests/test_m56_runtime.py tests/test_m57_integration_trial.py tests/test_m60_architecture_alignment.py -q

non_gating_notes: Default full-suite pytest was previously attempted and timed out at 304 seconds without reported failures; M6.1 acceptance uses the targeted compatibility and dialogue regression suites above.
conclusion: M6.1 acceptance criteria are satisfied. The cognitive event layer is observable, serializable, filterable, persona-scoped, optional, and behavior-preserving under the tested scripted dialogue path.
